sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, name String, description String, created_at DateTime, value Float64, nullable_value Nullable(Int32));
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (1, 'A', 'First entry', now(), 1.23, NULL), (2, 'B', 'Second entry', now(), 2.34, 3), (3, '', NULL, now(), 3.45, 4);
SELECT id, regexpQuoteMeta(name) AS escaped_name FROM test_table WHERE id < 5;
SELECT id, name, description FROM test_table WHERE created_at > now() - INTERVAL 1 DAY AND regexpQuoteMeta(description) = 'First entry';
SELECT id, value, regexpQuoteMeta(name) AS escaped_name FROM test_table WHERE value < (SELECT MAX(value) FROM test_table);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING COUNT(*) < regexpQuoteMeta('2');
SELECT id, AVG(value) AS avg_value FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING avg_value < (SELECT AVG(nullable_value) FROM test_table WHERE nullable_value IS NOT NULL);
WITH min_value AS (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table) SELECT id, value FROM test_table WHERE value < (SELECT MIN(value) FROM test_table) AND value IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TABLE another_table (id UInt32, reference_id UInt32, FOREIGN KEY(reference_id) REFERENCES test_table(id));
SELECT a.id, a.reference_id FROM another_table a JOIN test_table b ON a.reference_id < b.id WHERE regexpQuoteMeta(b.name) = 'A';
SELECT id, regexpQuoteMeta(NULLIF(name, '')) AS non_empty_name FROM test_table WHERE id < 3 AND non_empty_name IS NOT NULL;
SELECT id, regexpQuoteMeta(name) AS escaped_name FROM test_table WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM another_table WHERE reference_id = id) AND id < 4;
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN nullable_value Nullable(String);
SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count FROM test_table WHERE NULLIF(value, 0) < 1 GROUP BY id;
SELECT id, description FROM test_table WHERE description LIKE concat('%', regexpQuoteMeta('entry'), '%') AND created_at < now();
